message:
feat(fp-io): add read_csv lineterminator parity (frankenpandas-lb88)

Adds CsvReadOptions.lineterminator: Option<u8> matching pandas'
pd.read_csv(lineterminator=...) C-engine flag. When set, records are
split only on that single byte; when None the default CRLF/LF handling
is preserved. Routed through csv::ReaderBuilder::terminator with
csv::Terminator::Any so it composes cleanly with the existing
comment/skipfooter/quote options.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
